name: Bosera Science & Technology Innovation Theme 3-Year Closed Operation Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund
summary: Bosera Science & Technology Innovation Theme 3-Year Closed Operation Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund is a fund managed by Bosera Asset Management that invests in companies related to science and technology innovation with a flexible asset allocation strategy, and a closed operation period of three years. The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation while managing risk through diversification and a strategic investment approach.
